section.heading: Designation and naming within the Capitol Visitor Center

subsection.heading: In general
subsection.chapeau: Except as provided under subsection (b), no part of the Capitol Visitor Center may be designated or named without the approval of—

paragraph.content: not less than ¾ of all members on the Capitol Preservation Commission who are members of the Democratic party; and
not less than ¾ of all members on the Capitol Preservation Commission who are members of the Republican party.

content.p: Subsection (a) shall not apply to any room or space under the jurisdiction of the Senate or the House of Representatives.
